mechanism: A dedicated Log Analytics workspace per landing zone with 30-day retention.
why: Shared workspaces co-mingle telemetry — one team can query another's data, and ingestion cost can't be attributed. Retention beyond 30 days incurs per-GB charges across all workspaces without proportional value.

related.note: Log Analytics is one of the self-contained capabilities per landing zone.
Dedicated workspace keeps ingestion cost inside the application billing scope.
30-day retention stays within the zero-cost storage tier.

violations: Workspace shared across landing zones — telemetry co-mingles, cost unattributable.
Diagnostic settings pointing to a workspace outside the landing zone's subscription.
retentionInDays exceeding 30 — storage cost beyond free boundary.
